For centuries Twycross was regional capital in the Lyran Commonwealth; until the Jade Falcons conquered it June of 3050. Though the Federated Commonwealth briefly recaptured it in September of that same year; the Falcons quickly repulsed tne FedCom forces and the planet remains firmly under Falcon control:
ing, which left soil erosion and ecological damage in its wake. Radical shifts in the planet's wcather pattern have begun to appear in recent decades and many naturalists fear that past practices have irreparably damaged the planetary ecosystem. addition t0 being   the seat of Canopian   government; Canopus IV is the home base of one of the last remaining enter: tainment conglomerates in the Periphery:
THE PERIPHERY The Periphery contains countless nations, some as small single planet: Others; like the Magistracy of Canopus and the Taurian Concordat, occupy dozens of worlds. Renowned for its rugged independence and unwillingness to bow to the Inner Sphere_ the Periphery Is homc to everything from pleasure cir- cuses and police states to pirate kingdoms and technophobic enclaves.  - Canopus First settled in 2530 by band of ex-Free Worlds League soldiers, Canopus soon became the capital of the Magistracy of Canopus_ Extensive immigration to this mineral-rich world Ied population explosion and rapid industrialization. Over the next several centuries the planet suffered wide-scale strip min-
Antallos prosperous trade world following Its colonization in 2674, Antallos was sacked several times during the Succession Wars After particularly savage attack by the Draconis Combine_ which resulted In unprecedented civilian casualties_ the planel fragmented into city-states_ each of which has since attempted t0 subjugate its neighbors.
